snippet.title: HP CEO Enrique Lores on leadership
snippet.description:

snippet.title: HP Inc. CEO Enrique Lores on the economy: It's important to focus on areas we can control
snippet.description:

snippet.title: The Moment with Ryan Patel: Season Two Preview with HP CEO Enrique Lores | HP
snippet.description:
Welcome to season two of The Moment with Ryan Patel.

HP CEO Enrique Lores joined us to offer his personal insights into our season two guests and share his own takeaways on the excitement building for the future of AI. 

We would love to hear what you are most excited about as we launch season two of The Moment with Ryan Patel Let us know in the comments!

#HPTheMoment

For more conversations on The Moment with Ryan Patel, check us out on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/7EH1VIAoJFJlsGsGUwDTYQ

#leadership #disruption #ai #hpthemoment

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/2mGfXhF

SHOP NOW: https://www.hp.com/us-en/shop

About HP:
HP Inc. is a technology company that believes one thoughtful idea has the power to change the world. Its product and service portfolio of personal systems, printers, and 3D printing solutions helps bring these ideas to life. Visit http://www.hp.com. 

Connect with HP:
Visit HP WEBSITE: http://www.hp.com
Like HP on FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/HP
Follow HP on TWITTER: https://twitter.com/HP
Follow HP on INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/hp
Follow HP on LINKEDIN: https://www.linkedin.com/company/hp

snippet.title: HP CEO Enrique Lores: Hybrid work is here to stay as employees value flexibility
snippet.description:
HP CEO Enrique Lores joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss what he sees in demand for HP's work-from-home products, the size of HP's return to work product slate, and the health of the consumer and companies. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi
